Beverley strengthens Town of Culture bid as major free exhibition opens at Art Gallery

Thursday, 30 April, 2026
A major new exhibition at Beverley Art Gallery is bringing world-class art to the heart of the town, in what is being seen as another step towards Beverley’s ambition to become a future Town of Culture. ‘Memories of Drawings’, featuring the work of Georgia O’Keeffe, is a touring exhibition from the Southbank Centre’s Hayward Gallery and showcases 21 rare prints charting her development as one of...
